zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de  Everingham於1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓時，他的父親Adam Everingham28歲，母親Joan d'Eiville20歲。他於1359年與Agatha Everingham在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年8月16日在英國諾薩普頓史爾拉可頓享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de  Everingham于1335年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓时，他的父亲Adam Everingham28岁，母亲Joan d'Eiville20岁。他于1359年与Agatha Everingham在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年8月16日在英国諾薩普頓史爾拉可頓享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de  Everingham was born in 1335, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Everingham, was 28 and his mother, Joan d'Eiville, was 20. He married Agatha Everingham in 1359, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 16 August 1369, in Laxton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de  Everingham est né en 1335, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Everingham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan d'Eiville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agatha Everingham en 1359, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 août 1369, à Laxton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de  Everingham 1335 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Everingham 28 und seine Mutter Joan d'Eiville 20. Er hat 1359 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Agatha Everingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. August 1369 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Laxton, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de  Everingham è nato il nel 1335 nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Everingham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan d'Eiville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agatha Everingham nel 1359, nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 agosto 1369, nel Laxton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de  Everinghamが1335年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンで生まれた時，父Adam Everinghamは28歳，母Joan d'Eivilleは20歳であった。1359年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンでAgatha Everinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年8月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアラクストンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de  Everingham(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Everingham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan d'Eiville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 Agatha Everingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 8월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 라스턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de  Everingham nasceu em 1335, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Everingham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan d'Eiville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha Everingham em 1359, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1369, em Laxton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de  Everingham родился в 1335 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Everingham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan d'Eiville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha Everingham в 1359 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 августа 1369 г. в местности лакстон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de  Everingham nació en 1335, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Everingham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan d'Eiville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agatha Everingham en 1359, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1369, en Laxton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
